title: schizopleura purpurea
intro: Schizopleura purpurea is a flowering plant species in the family Boraginaceae, commonly known as the purple bugloss. Its medicinal properties are primarily attributed to its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing inflammation, and providing antioxidant effects. Herbal preparations of Schizopleura purpurea include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various ailments, although its efficacy and safety should be further researched.
